China CPI Jumps as Middle East Crisis Pushes Energy Costs Higher
headlines.summary: China's consumer inflation accelerated to 1.2% in April, topping analyst estimates, as the Middle East crisis drove a surge in energy prices. headlines.title: Global Coal Demand Surges as Middle East Energy Crisis Deepens
headlines.summary: Global coal shipments and imports surged in March and April as buyers scrambled for fuel amid massively disrupted oil and gas supply from the Middle East. headlines.title: China’s Car Sales Slump as Gasoline Demand Craters
headlines.summary: Car sales in China fell by 21.5% in April, driven by lower demand for gasoline-powered vehicles amid higher fuel prices. headlines.title: Modi Urges Indians to Conserve Fuel as Oil Shock Spreads
headlines.summary: India’s Prime Minister called on the nation to work from home, travel less, and conserve fuel to help the government save foreign exchange. “In the current situation, we must place great emphasis on saving foreign exchange,” Narendra Modi said, as quoted by Reuters.
